title: FedRAMP Controls + Identity Analytics + IGA — Certification Campaign Automation
description: test_fedramp_controls.py, test_identity_risk_engine.py, and test_identity_analytics_engine.py cluster with test_iga_engine.py. The IGA engine creates access reviews but certification campaigns are not scheduled — reviewers must be manually notified. FedRAMP controls are listed but not mapped to ALDECI's actual access control policies.
missing: Certification campaign scheduler: cron job that creates periodic access review campaigns per configured frequency (quarterly/annual) and emails reviewers with direct links to their certification queue
FedRAMP control → access policy mapping: map each AC family FedRAMP control to the corresponding access_control_engine policy and show compliance status per control
Identity risk → IGA trigger: when identity_risk_engine computes risk_level=high, auto-create an access review for that identity's entitlements
